text: AI is becoming a common part of the modern workplace. One of the main benefits is automation, which handles repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling, freeing up time for employees. Many companies also use productivity tools powered by AI, such as smart email filters or project management assistants, to help teams work more efficiently. This leads to human-AI collaboration, where people and machines complement each other’s strengths—humans bring creativity and judgment, while AI offers speed and accuracy. As a result, some jobs are changing rather than disappearing. Workers may need to learn new skills, but they can often focus on more meaningful work instead of routine chores.
